title: QP, RP & RPi: Three Distinct Roles
alt: Three pharma quality roles QP, RP and RPi with their authorisations and duties

items.label: QP - Qualified Person
items.desc: Named on an MIA; certifies each batch before release under Annex 16

items.label: RP - Responsible Person
items.desc: Named on a WDA(H); ensures continuous GDP across wholesale

items.label: RPi - RP for Import
items.desc: UK oversight of qualifying GB imports; does not re-certify batches
